name: Battle Angel
overview:
Doc Ido, a doctor and mechanic who lives and works in the postapocalyptic "Scrapyard", finds the remains of a female cyborg in a junk heap.

After he revives and rebuilds her, the amnesiac "Gally" begins a life for herself in a world where every day can bring a new fight.

trailers.title: Battle Angel Alita Trailer HD (1993 Anime OVA)
